description: Product images served without optimization causing LCP > 4s
actualBehavior: Unoptimized hero images cause LCP of 4-6s on slow 3G

description: Product list endpoint has artificial 2-3s delay
actualBehavior: Endpoint includes random 2000-3000ms delay simulating a slow database query
testHint: Assert GET /api/products response time is under 500ms

description: Product grid causes Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) on load
actualBehavior: Images load without reserved dimensions causing CLS of 0.3-0.5

description: Dashboard component creates a setInterval that never clears on unmount
expectedBehavior: Component cleanup removes all timers on unmount
actualBehavior: Memory leak accumulates with each mount/unmount cycle
testHint: Mount and unmount dashboard 10 times and assert heap memory does not grow monotonically

description: Below-fold product images are not lazy loaded
actualBehavior: All product images load eagerly on page mount regardless of scroll position
testHint: Assert product images beyond the first viewport row have loading='lazy' attribute

description: Reports endpoint recalculates all metrics on every request with no caching
expectedBehavior: Aggregated metrics are cached and invalidated on new events
actualBehavior: Every GET /api/reports runs a full table scan with no cache layer
testHint: Assert 10 consecutive GET /api/reports requests complete in under 200ms each

description: First Input Delay (FID) caused by large synchronous JS on mount
actualBehavior: Synchronous filtering logic blocks the main thread for 400-600ms on initial load
testHint: Run Lighthouse and assert Total Blocking Time <= 300ms
